title: Privacy Policy
subtitle: Transparency about how we handle your personal data.

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.content: Your privacy is extremely important to us. This Privacy Policy details transparently how TreinaVagaAI collects, stores, protects, and uses your personal information when using our platform.

informationCollection.title: 2. Information Collection
informationCollection.content: To provide the best experience, we may collect the following types of information:
list: Personal Information: Full name, email, and photo (via social login).
Usage Data: Quiz statistics, progress, and interactions.
Technical Data: IP address, device, and browser.

useOfInformation.title: 3. Use of Information
useOfInformation.content: We use your data strictly to:
list: Personalize study recommendations based on performance.

sharing.title: 4. Sharing
sharing.content: We do not sell your personal information. Sharing occurs only with essential service providers (such as cloud infrastructure) who have contractual confidentiality obligations.

dataSecurity.title: 5. Data Security
dataSecurity.content: We adopt rigorous technical and administrative security measures, including encryption and access controls, to protect your data against unauthorized access, loss, or alteration.

yourRights.title: 6. Your Rights
yourRights.content: You have full control over your data. At any time, you can request access, correction, or deletion of your personal information through account settings or support.

cookies.title: 7. Cookies
cookies.content: We use cookies to improve navigation, remember preferences, and analyze traffic. You can manage preferences directly in your browser.
